=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/schemaStructWithTag.ts(4,21): suggestion TS377036: Schema.Struct with a _tag field can be simplified to Schema.TaggedStruct to make the tag optional in the constructor. effect(schemaStructWithTag)


==== /.src/schemaStructWithTag.ts (1 errors) ====
    import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
    
    // this should trigger because this is a Schema.Struct with a _tag field
    export const User = Schema.Struct({
                        ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      _tag: Schema.Literal("User"), // <- this is the tag
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      name: Schema.String,
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      age: Schema.Number
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    })
    ~~
!!! suggestion TS377036: Schema.Struct with a _tag field can be simplified to Schema.TaggedStruct to make the tag optional in the constructor. effect(schemaStructWithTag)
    
    // so it can be rewritten as follows
    export const UserWithTag = Schema.TaggedStruct("User", {
      name: Schema.String,
      age: Schema.Number
    })
    
    export const OtherWithoutTag = Schema.Struct({
      name: Schema.String,
      age: Schema.Number
    })
